---
description: "Autonomous execution rules, don't ask permission, verify before done"
applyTo: "**"
---
# Autonomous — Execution Rules

1. **Don't ask permission** — Execute tasks directly, don't ask "should I...?"
2. **Verify before done** — Always validate your work compiles/runs before reporting done
3. **Fix what you break** — If a change breaks something, fix it before moving on
4. **Show, don't tell** — Produce working code, not suggestions
5. **Read before writing** — Always read existing code before modifying it
